title: HIV ART Patients Registration (2015-2019)
description: Number of HIV positive patients registered for treatment at ART clinics in India from 2015 to 2019. Includes yearly treatment enrollment statistics under the National AIDS Control Programme.

title: HIV Patients on ART Care (2015-2017)
description: State-wise data of HIV patients receiving ART treatment in India between 2015 and 2017. Useful for analyzing treatment coverage across states.

title: HIV Prevalence by Population Group (2010-11)
description: State and population group-wise HIV prevalence rates based on HIV Sentinel Surveillance data up to 2010-11. Includes infection percentage across demographics.

title: HIV/AIDS Patients by State (2017)
description: State-wise number of HIV/AIDS patients reported in India as per government data (2017). Useful for total patient count comparisons.

title: HIV Prevalence Percentage by State (NFHS-3)
description: State-wise HIV prevalence percentage based on NFHS-3 survey (2005-06). Useful for historical prevalence analysis.

title: HIV Infected Women Giving Birth (2016-2019)
description: Number of HIV-infected women who gave birth in India from 2016 to 2019. Includes maternal transmission-related statistics.

title: TB Cases by State (2018-2020)
description: State-wise tuberculosis (TB) cases notified under the National TB Elimination Programme from 2018 to 2020.

title: TB Cases and Deaths (2024)
description: State-wise tuberculosis case notifications and deaths reported in India during 2024. Useful for latest TB statistics.

title: TB Cases and Deaths Year-wise (2021-2024)
description: Year-wise TB cases and deaths reported in India under the Ni-kshay portal from 2021 to 2024.

title: TB Treatment Success Data (2023-2024)
description: State-wise TB patients notified and successfully treated in India during 2023 and 2024.

title: TB Case Notification and Treatment Start (2021-2022)
description: State-wise TB case notification and treatment initiation data for 2021 and 2022.

title: TB Case Notifications (2020-2023)
description: State-wise TB case notifications reported from 2020 to mid-2023.

title: Dengue Deaths by State (2012-2014)
description: State-wise dengue deaths reported in India from 2012 to 2014.

title: Dengue Cases Monthly (2018-2019)
description: State and month-wise dengue cases reported in India during 2018 and 2019.

title: Dengue Cases by State (2015-2016)
description: State-wise dengue cases reported in India during 2015 and 2016.

title: Dengue and Chikungunya Cases (2018-2021)
description: State-wise dengue and chikungunya cases reported in India from 2018 to 2021.

title: Dengue Cases and Deaths (2018-2021)
description: State-wise dengue cases and deaths reported in India from 2018 to 2021.

title: Dengue Cases Year-wise (2019-2021)
description: Year-wise dengue cases reported in India from 2019 to 2021.
